      static MouseCursor getResizingCursor(ResizeDirection direction)
      Replies the mouse cursor that is corresponding to the specified resizing direction.

    • Method Detail

      • getResizingCursor

        public static MouseCursor getResizingCursor(ResizeDirection direction)
        Replies the mouse cursor that is corresponding to the specified resizing direction.
        Parameters:
        direction -
        Returns:
        the cursor or null to use the default.
